title: ‘We keep our finances separate’: My boyfriend is in his 50s with no retirement savings — how worried should I be?
summary: A woman seeks financial advice about her boyfriend's lack of retirement savings despite being in his 50s, while noting they own their jointly-titled home mortgage-free. The article addresses concerns about financial compatibility and security in relationships.
content: “He built our home over the last three years. We are both on the title and carry no mortgage.”

zh.title: '我们各自管理自己的财务'：我的男友已经五十多岁却没有退休储蓄——我应该有多担心？
zh.summary: 一位女性就其50多岁的男友缺乏退休储蓄寻求财务建议，尽管他们共同拥有一套无贷款的住房。该文章涉及对财务相容性和关系安全的担忧。

title: Why this market rally still has room to run — until these two signals flash
summary: Nomura strategist Charlie McElligott suggests the current market rally has more upside potential, though specific technical or economic signals may soon indicate a reversal. The analysis provides guidance on when to reassess bullish positioning.
content: Nomura strategist Charlie McElligott says there’s no reason to abandon this market chase higher, but there may soon be.

zh.title: 为什么这轮市场反弹仍有上升空间——直到这两个信号闪现
zh.summary: 野村策略师查理·麦克埃利戈特表示，当前的市场反弹仍有更多上升空间，尽管特定的技术或经济信号可能很快表明反转。该分析为何时重新评估看涨头寸提供了指导。

title: New Social Security proposal would cap payments for wealthy people now — and many more later on
summary: A new proposal would implement benefit caps for wealthy Social Security recipients immediately and expand coverage to more people later, potentially helping solve the program's fiscal challenges. The Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget suggests such limits could significantly improve long-term sustainability.
content: Benefit limits could do a lot to solve Social Security’s fiscal problems, CRFB suggests. But check the fine print.

zh.title: 新的社会保障提案拟立即对富人的福利进行上限，并在之后扩大对更多人的覆盖
zh.summary: 一项新提案将立即对富裕社会保障领取者实施福利上限，并在之后扩大覆盖范围，有可能帮助解决该计划的财政挑战。负责任联邦预算委员会建议，这样的限制可能会显著改善长期可持续性。

title: The E.U. asks Google to share its search-engine data with competitors
summary: The European Commission has proposed measures requiring Google to share its search engine data with competitors to reduce its market dominance. This regulatory action represents the EU's continued effort to constrain big tech's control over digital markets.
content: The European Commission has proposed measures to Google to minimize its dominance.

zh.title: 欧盟要求谷歌与竞争对手共享其搜索引擎数据
zh.summary: 欧盟委员会提出了措施，要求谷歌与竞争对手共享其搜索引擎数据，以减少其市场主导地位。这一监管行动代表了欧盟继续努力制约大科技公司对数字市场的控制。

title: Mark Mobius, 'Indiana Jones of emerging markets,' dies at 89
summary: Mark Mobius, a legendary investor credited as a pioneer in emerging markets investing, passed away Wednesday at age 89. His career spanned decades establishing standards and strategies for emerging market investment.
content: Mark Mobius, widely credited as a pioneer in emerging markets investing, died on Wednesday at the age of 89, according to a statement on ⁠his LinkedIn page.

zh.title: "新兴市场的印地安纳琼斯"马克·莫比乌斯在89岁时去世
zh.summary: 被誉为新兴市场投资先驱的传奇投资者马克·莫比乌斯于周三去世，享年89岁。他的职业生涯跨越数十年，为新兴市场投资建立了标准和策略。

title: Lilly's obesity pill helps reduce cardiovascular risks in late-stage trial
summary: In a late-stage clinical trial of over 2,700 adults, Eli Lilly's obesity medication Foundayo demonstrated a 16% reduction in cardiovascular risks including heart attack and stroke. The results suggest the drug may offer broader health benefits beyond weight management.
content: In the study of more than 2,700 adults, patients taking Foundayo had a 16% lower risk of heart attack, stroke or cardiovascular death.

zh.title: 礼来减肥药在晚期临床试验中有助于降低心血管风险
zh.summary: 在一项包含超过2700名成年人的晚期临床试验中，礼来公司的减肥药物Foundayo证明了心血管风险（包括心脏病发作和中风）降低16%。结果表明该药物可能在体重管理之外提供更广泛的健康益处。

title: Hims & Hers stock jumps as U.S. moves forward with plan to reassess popular peptides
summary: Hims & Hers' stock surged following U.S. regulatory developments that make the company's peptide business expansion more viable. The move brings the telehealth company closer to entering the growing peptide market.
content: Hims & Hers Health’s plan to enter the business of selling peptides is looking a lot more realistic.

zh.title: 美国推进评估热门肽的计划，Hims & Hers股价上涨
zh.summary: 随着美国监管进展使公司肽业务扩展更具可行性，Hims & Hers股价飙升。此举使远程医疗公司更接近进入不断增长的肽市场。

title: This hidden oil price is ripping the hull out of the global economy
summary: While visible gasoline price spikes capture attention, another oil-related crisis is quietly damaging the global economy. The article highlights a less-noticed economic impact of oil markets on broader economic stability.
content: Gasoline is the crisis you can see. Here’s the one you can’t.

zh.title: 这个隐藏的油价正在摧毁全球经济
zh.summary: 当显眼的汽油价格飙升吸引关注时，另一场石油相关危机正在悄悄地损害全球经济。该文章强调了石油市场对更广泛经济稳定性的一个较少被注意到的经济影响。

title: Big energy shock will push up prices, Bank boss tells BBC
summary: Bank of England governor warns that the Iran war energy shock will increase prices and complicates the next interest rate decision.
content: Bank of England governor says the Iran war energy shock makes the next interest rate decision "very, very difficult".

zh.title: 能源冲击将推高价格，英国央行行长告诉英国广播公司
zh.summary: 英国央行行长警告伊朗战争引发的能源冲击将推高价格，并使下一次利率决策更加复杂。

title: TSMC first-quarter profit rises 58%, beats estimates as AI demand fuels record run
summary: TSMC reported record quarterly profit up 58%, beating expectations, with management expecting sustained AI demand to drive continued growth.
content: TSMC reported another quarter of record profit, with the company expecting AI demand to continue to grow.

zh.summary: 台积电报告季度利润创纪录上升58%，超过预期，管理层预计持续的AI需求将继续驱动增长。

title: UK economy grew faster than expected ahead of Iran war
summary: UK economy expanded 0.5% in February, exceeding Office for National Statistics forecasts ahead of the Iran war's economic impact.
content: The Office for National Statistics says the economy expanded by 0.5% in February.

zh.title: 英国经济在伊朗战争前增长快于预期

title: UK economy grew 0.5% in February, beating economists' expectations by a long shot
summary: UK gross domestic product grew 0.5% month-on-month in February, significantly surpassing economist expectations of 0.1% expansion.
content: Economists polled by Reuters expected U.K. gross domestic product (GDP) to have expanded by 0.1% month-on-month.

zh.title: 英国2月经济增长0.5%，远超经济学家预期
zh.summary: 英国2月月度国内生产总值增长0.5%，远超经济学家0.1%增长预期。

title: Trump says Israel and Lebanon leaders to hold talks after first high-level meeting in decades
summary: Following their first high-level meeting in decades, the U.S. president announced Israel and Lebanon leaders will hold talks aimed at easing regional tensions.
content: The U.S. president said he was "trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon."

zh.title: 特朗普表示以色列和黎巴嫩领导人将在数十年来首次高级会晤后进行谈判
zh.summary: 在数十年来首次高级会晤后，美国总统宣布以色列和黎巴嫩领导人将举行旨在缓解地区紧张局势的谈判。

title: China economic growth accelerates to 5% in first quarter — but Iran war clouds outlook
summary: China's first-quarter economic growth accelerated to 5%, meeting its lowered annual growth target, though Iran war geopolitical risks loom ahead.
content: Beijing had lowered its growth target this year to a range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal on record going back to the early 1990s.

zh.title: 中国一季度经济增长加速至5%，伊朗战争笼罩前景
zh.summary: 中国一季度经济增长加速至5%，达到其下调的年度增长目标，但伊朗战争地缘政治风险仍存。

title: Inside India newsletter: Small towns are powering e-commerce's fastest-growing market, dominated by Amazon, Walmart unit
summary: Small towns are driving rapid growth in India's e-commerce market, with Amazon and Flipkart competing for customers through improved delivery networks and rising consumer aspirations.
content: Small towns are fueling India’s e‑commerce surge, with Amazon and Flipkart chasing new shoppers, faster delivery and rising aspirational demand.

zh.title: 印度通讯：小城镇推动电子商务增长最快的市场，由亚马逊和沃尔玛子公司主导
zh.summary: 小城镇推动印度电子商务市场快速增长，亚马逊和Flipkart通过完善配送网络和消费者购买力上升而争夺市场份额。

title: European stocks set for another mixed open as Iran peace efforts remain unclear
summary: European stock markets are expected to open with mixed sentiment as investors assess unclear signals about Iran war progression and potential peace negotiations.
content: European stocks are expected to open in mixed territory as investors assess a confused picture of where the Iran war and peace talks are headed.

zh.title: 伊朗和平前景不明，欧洲股市面临又一个波动开盘
zh.summary: 投资者对伊朗战争进展和潜在和平谈判的信号不确定，欧洲股市预期将以混合情绪开盘。

title: The price of school prom is extortionate, says teen
summary: Parents and former students criticize escalating prom costs as placing excessive financial burden on families and students.
content: A parent and ex-pupil says proms put pressure on children and adults alike.

zh.title: 青少年称学校舞会价格过高
zh.summary: 家长和前学生批评舞会成本不断上升，给家庭和学生造成过度的经济负担。

title: Japan pledges $10bn to help Asian countries deal with oil crisis
summary: Japan pledged $10 billion in aid to help Asian nations manage an oil crisis triggered by the Iran conflict.
content: The aid is roughly equivalent to a year's worth of crude oil imports by Asean countries.

zh.title: 日本承诺提供100亿美元援助亚洲国家应对石油危机
zh.summary: 日本承诺提供100亿美元援助，帮助亚洲国家应对由伊朗冲突引发的石油危机。

title: Japan's Nikkei 225 hits record high as hopes for U.S.-Iran deal fuel broader rally in Asia stocks
summary: Japan's Nikkei 225 index reached an all-time high as growing expectations of a U.S.-Iran peace deal triggered a broader rally across Asian stock markets.
content: Asia markets opened higher, with Nikkei at an all-time high after Wall Street hit record levels on growing expectations of a U.S.-Iran deal to end the war.

zh.title: 日本日经225指数创历史新高，美伊协议希望推动亚洲股市广泛上涨
zh.summary: 随着美伊和平协议的预期增加，日本日经225指数达到历史新高，引发了亚洲股市的广泛上涨。

title: Is Tesla a chip stock now? Investors are cheering a semiconductor milestone.
summary: Tesla completed a critical development milestone for its AI5 semiconductor chip designed to power humanoid robots and supercomputers, boosting investor confidence.
content: The AI5 chip, which Tesla says will power humanoid robots and supercomputers, has completed a critical step.

zh.title: 特斯拉现在是芯片股吗？投资者为半导体里程碑欢呼
zh.summary: 特斯拉完成了其AI5半导体芯片的关键开发里程碑，该芯片旨在为人形机器人和超级计算机提供动力，提升了投资者信心。

title: China's economy grows faster than expected despite Iran war
summary: China's economy exceeded growth expectations despite being hit by economic disruptions from the Iran war affecting multiple Asian economies.
content: The better-than-expected GDP data comes as Asian countries have been hit hard by the impact of the conflict.

zh.title: 尽管伊朗战争,中国经济增长超出预期
zh.summary: 中国经济超出预期增长,尽管受到伊朗战争造成的经济中断影响,波及多个亚洲经济体。

title: Daikin shares jump 14% after activist investor Elliott pushes for reforms
summary: Activist investor Elliott called for operational reforms at Daikin, prompting a 14% surge in the company's share price.
content: Daikin shares surged as much as 13.9% after activist investor Elliott urged the company to boost margins and shareholder returns.

zh.title: 激进投资者Elliott敦促改革后,大金股价跳涨14%
zh.summary: 激进投资者Elliott呼吁大金进行运营改革,促使该公司股价上涨14%。

title: Allbirds shares soar after pivot from shoes to AI
summary: Allbirds announced a strategic pivot away from its shoe business toward providing artificial intelligence and technology infrastructure services.
content: The company is selling off its shoe brand as it plans to shift to providing technology infrastructure.

zh.title: Allbirds从鞋类业务转向AI后股价飙升
zh.summary: Allbirds宣布战略转向,从鞋类业务转向人工智能和技术基础设施服务。

title: Live Nation stock falls as jury finds ticketing giant acted as an illegal monopoly. Here’s what happens next.
summary: A jury found that Ticketmaster's parent company, Live Nation, operated as an illegal monopoly in the ticketing industry, causing its stock to fall sharply. The ruling could have significant implications for ticket pricing, consumer costs, and industry competition going forward.
content: Shares of Live Nation sank on Wednesday after a jury found that the Ticketmaster parent had acted as an illegal monopoly over the ticketing industry, according to reports.

zh.title: Live Nation股票下跌 陪审团裁定售票巨头构成非法垄断 接下来会怎样？
zh.summary: 陪审团裁定Ticketmaster的母公司Live Nation在售票行业中实行非法垄断，导致其股价大幅下跌。该裁决可能对票价、消费者成本和行业竞争产生重大影响。

title: Stock futures are little changed following a record-setting day for S&P 500 and Nasdaq: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq reached new record highs as investors dismissed concerns about Middle East tensions and geopolitical risks. Stock futures showed minimal movement following these gains, suggesting cautious sentiment heading into the next session.
content: The S&P 500 and the Nasdaq Composite climbed to new records as traders shook off worries about the Middle East conflict.

zh.title: 标普500和纳斯达克创纪录后 股指期货基本持平 实时更新
zh.summary: 标普500和纳斯达克创下新高，投资者消化了对中东局势和地缘政治风险的担忧。股指期货在这些涨幅后基本持平，表明对下一交易时段持谨慎态度。

title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq climbed to record levels on Wednesday as traders overlooked Middle East conflict concerns. Investors will watch closely for key catalysts and data that could move markets in Thursday's trading session.
content: The S&P 500 and the Nasdaq Composite rose to records in Wednesday's trading as traders seemed to shake off worries over the Middle East conflict.

zh.title: 周四股市重大新闻 什么将推动下一交易时段的市场走向
zh.summary: 周三标普500和纳斯达克攀升至纪录高位，交易员忽视了中东冲突的担忧。投资者将密切关注可能在周四交易时段推动市场的关键催化剂和数据。
